channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-2741] Failure on test suite lfsck
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for sarah <sarah@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sets/baa5681c-6c5c-11e2-91d6-52540035b04c.

03:55:19:client-16vm4: error looking up OST object subdir
03:55:19:client-16vm4: [QUOTA WARNING] Usage inconsistent for ID 0:actual (6488064, 317) != expected (26722304, 600)
03:55:19:client-16vm4: [QUOTA WARNING] Usage inconsistent for ID 0:actual (6488064, 317) != expected (26722304, 600)
03:55:19:client-16vm4: e2fsck: aborted
03:55:19:Warning!  /dev/mapper/lvm--OSS-P1 is in use.
03:55:19:Warning: skipping journal recovery because doing a read-only filesystem check.
03:55:19:Pass 1: Checking inodes, blocks, and sizes
03:55:19:Pass 1: Memory used: 268k/0k (125k/144k), time:  0.08/ 0.02/ 0.01
03:55:19:Pass 1: I/O read: 9MB, write: 0MB, rate: 108.76MB/s
03:55:19:Pass 2: Checking directory structure
03:55:19:Pass 2: Memory used: 268k/0k (137k/132k), time:  0.05/ 0.00/ 0.00
03:55:19:Pass 2: I/O read: 1MB, write: 0MB, rate: 22.14MB/s
03:55:19:Pass 3: Checking directory connectivity
03:55:19:Peak memory: Memory used: 268k/0k (137k/132k), time:  0.18/ 0.02/ 0.01
03:55:19:Pass 3: Memory used: 268k/0k (136k/133k), time:  0.00/ 0.00/ 0.00
03:55:19:Pass 3: I/O read: 1MB, write: 0MB, rate: 12195.12MB/s
03:55:19:Pass 4: Checking reference counts
03:55:19:Unattached inode 99
03:55:19:Connect to /lost+found? no
03:55:19:
03:55:19:Unattached inode 100
03:55:19:Connect to /lost+found? no
03:55:19:
03:55:19:Pass 4: Memory used: 268k/0k (70k/199k), time:  0.00/ 0.00/ 0.00
03:55:19:Pass 4: I/O read: 1MB, write: 0MB, rate: 217.20MB/s
03:55:19:Pass 5: Checking group summary information
03:55:19:Free blocks count wrong (482903, counted=487851).
03:55:19:Fix? no
03:55:19:
03:55:19:Free inodes count wrong (130453, counted=130746).
03:55:19:Fix? no
03:55:19:
03:55:19:Pass 5: Memory used: 268k/0k (70k/199k), time:  0.04/ 0.03/ 0.00
03:55:19:Pass 5: I/O read: 1MB, write: 0MB, rate: 28.02MB/s
03:55:19:Pass 6: Acquiring OST information for lfsck
03:55:19:OST: 'lustre-OST0000_UUID' ost idx 0: compat 0x2 rocomp 0 incomp 0x2
03:55:19:Update quota info for quota type 0? no
03:55:19:
03:55:19:Update quota info for quota type 1? no
03:55:19:
03:55:19:
03:55:19:lustre-OST0000: ********** WARNING: Filesystem still has errors **********
03:55:19:
03:55:19: lfsck : @@@@@@ FAIL: e2fsck -d -v -t -t -f -n --mdsdb /home/autotest/.autotest/shared_dir/2013-01-30/225235-70344794676300/mdsdb --ostdb /home/autotest/.autotest/shared_dir/2013-01-30/225235-70344794676300/ostdb-0 /dev/mapper/lvm--OSS-P1 returned 12, should be <= 4 
03:55:19:  Trace dump:
03:55:20:  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:3959:error_noexit()
03:55:20:  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:3982:error()
03:55:20:  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:3499:run_e2fsck()
03:55:20:  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:3537:generate_db()
03:55:20:  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/lfsck.sh:265:main()
03:55:20:Dumping lctl log to /logdir/test_logs/2013-01-30/lustre-master-el6-x86_64--full--1_1_1__1208__-70344794676300-225235/lfsck..*.1359633308.log
03:55:20:CMD: client-16vm1,client-16vm2.lab.whamcloud.com,client-16vm3,client-16vm4 /usr/sbin/lctl dk > /logdir/test_logs/2013-01-30/lustre-master-el6-x86_64--full--1_1_1__1208__-70344794676300-225235/lfsck..debug_log.\$(hostname -s).1359633308.log;
03:55:20:         dmesg > /logdir/test_logs/2013-01-30/lustre-master-el6-x86_64--full--1_1_1__1208__-70344794676300-225235/lfsck..dmesg.\$(hostname -s).1359633308.log
03:55:20:lfsck returned 0
03:55:20:running: conf-sanity 
03:55:20:run_suite conf-sanity /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/conf-sanity.sh

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: duplicated with LU-2694
This should be duplicated with LU-2694
